hooks.command: node -e "const chunks=[]; process.stdin.on('data',d=>chunks.push(d)); process.stdin.on('end',()=>{ try{ const cmd=JSON.parse(Buffer.concat(chunks)).tool_input?.command||''; if(cmd.includes('git push')) process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify({systemMessage:'📝 プッシュ完了。/update-docs を実行して ROADMAP / CHANGELOG / SESSION.md を更新してください。'})); }catch(e){} });"

allow: Bash(node -e "const p=require\('./package.json'\); console.log\('version:', p.version\); console.log\('scripts:', Object.keys\(p.scripts\).join\(', '\)\)")
